title: acalypha chordantha
intro: Acalypha chordantha, also known as the "Three-seeded Mercury" or "Chordana", is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acalypha chordantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Acalypha chordantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, as well as being used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
